title: selaginella altheae
intro: Selaginella altheae, also known as spikemoss, is a species of evergreen plant in the genus Selaginella, characterized by its small, spiky leaves that resemble moss. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antifungal compounds, which have been shown to have potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. The health benefits of Selaginella altheae include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and improve skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being incorporated into topical creams and ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
